canonical_text: The five tribes of machine learning will converge into a single master algorithm
subject: Pedro Domingos
verdict: Transformers dominated via scale, not theoretical unification of paradigms

canonical_text: Each ML paradigm (symbolist, connectionist, evolutionary, Bayesian, analogizer) captures something essential
subject: Pedro Domingos
verdict: Valid taxonomy; different approaches still matter for specialized problems

canonical_text: Whoever discovers the master algorithm will control the future of technology
subject: Pedro Domingos
verdict: Scale, data, and compute mattered more than a single algorithmic breakthrough
